name: Sentosha: Battle Wheels
overview: Renowned entertainers and car lovers grasp the wheel and compete with their battle cars in a variety of never before seen challenges! They face off in life-threatening duels designed to test their speed, courage, and above all, their grit! Put the pedal to the metal! Burn! Destroy! Crash into! This is a new show of the "Dangertainment variety (danger + entertainment)".

trailers.title: 【新番組】前代未聞の自動車合戦『戦闘車』新バラエティ番組 90秒予告 Part1｜Amazonプライム・ビデオ
